title: Integration verification + compile check + M3 milestone validation

reference_files.reason: M3 milestone scope and verification criteria
M3 exit criteria checklist from session context

acceptance_criteria: All M3 subtasks (01-19) completed and verified
Project compiles successfully via gradle build (./gradlew compileJava or ./gradlew build) with no errors
No circular dependencies or missing class references between M3 components
ModularShootAPI has all M3 register methods: registerShootPredicate, registerDamageHandler, registerTraitHook
BulletManager.fireBullet() creates and registers bullet correctly

Shooting flow end-to-end: left-click -> ShootC2SPacket -> server handler -> fire rate -> anti-cheat -> ShootPredicate -> PreShootEvent -> snapshot -> spread -> register bullet -> sound -> PostShootEvent

Bullet lifecycle end-to-end: tick -> advance -> collision -> (entity hit -> damage chain -> hurt -> onHit -> penetration) or (block hit -> onBlockHit -> penetration) or (range/unloaded -> onExpire) -> onRemove
Trait hooks trigger at correct points (onTick, onHit, onBlockHit, onExpire, onRemove)
Verification: holding gun + left-click shoots bullet that flies and hits entity causing damage
Verification: penetration bullet (entity_penetration > 0) hits multiple targets
Verification: block penetration count correct (block_penetration > 0 passes through walls)
Verification: BulletManager.fireBullet() independent firing works (no player shooting engine needed)
deliverables: Integration test notes documenting end-to-end flow verification
